2604.11625.title: SCNO: Spiking Compositional Neural Operator -- Towards a Neuromorphic Foundation Model for Nuclear PDE Solving
2604.11625.paper_summary: Neural operators have emerged as powerful surrogates for partial differential equation (PDE) solvers, yet they are typically trained as monolithic models for individual PDEs, require energy-intensive GPU hardware, and must be retrained from scratch when new physics emerge. We introduce the Spiking Compositional Neural Operator (SCNO), a modular architecture combining spiking and conventional components that addresses all three limitations. SCNO maintains a library of small spiking neural operator blocks, each trained on a single elementary differential operator (convection, diffusion, reaction), and composes them through a lightweight input-conditioned aggregator to solve coupled PDEs not seen during block training. A small correction network learns cross-coupling residuals while keeping all blocks and the aggregator frozen, preserving zero-forgetting modular expansion by construction. We evaluate SCNO on eight PDE families including five coupled systems and a nuclear-relevant 1-group neutron diffusion equation. SCNO with correction achieves the lowest relative $L^2$ error on four of five coupled PDEs, outperforming both a monolithic spiking DeepONet (by up to 62%, mean over 3 seeds) and a standard ANN DeepONet (by up to 65%), while requiring only 95K trainable parameters versus 462K for the monolithic baseline. To our knowledge, this is the first compositional spiking neural operator and the first proof-of-concept for modular neuromorphic PDE solving with built-in forgetting-free expansion.
2604.11625.paper_summary_zh: 神經運算子已成為偏微分方程（PDE）求解器的強大替代品，但它們通常作為單一模型針對個別PDE進行訓練，並且需要耗能的GPU硬體，當新物理現象出現時必須從頭開始重新訓練。我們介紹了脈衝組合神經運算子（SCNO），這是一種模組化架構，結合了脈衝和常規組件，解決了這三個限制。SCNO維持一個小型脈衝神經運算子區塊的庫，每個區塊都是針對單一基本微分運算子（對流、擴散、反應）進行訓練，並通過輕量級的輸入條件聚合器將它們組合起來，以解決在區塊訓練期間未見過的耦合PDE。一個小型修正網絡在保持所有區塊和聚合器凍結的情況下學習交叉耦合殘差，通過結構保持零遺忘的模組擴展。我們在八個PDE家族上評估SCNO，包括五個耦合系統和一個與核相關的1組中子擴散方程。帶有修正的SCNO在五個耦合PDE中的四個上達到了最低的相對$L^2$誤差，超越了單一脈衝DeepONet（最多提高62%，三次隨機種子的平均值）和標準ANN DeepONet（最多提高65%），同時只需95K可訓練參數，而單一基準則需要462K。據我們所知，這是第一個組合脈衝神經運算子，也是第一個模組化神經形態PDE求解的概念驗證，具有內建的無遺忘擴展功能。
2604.11625.author: Samrendra Roy et.al.
2604.11625.authors: Samrendra Roy, Souvik Chakraborty, Rizwan-uddin, Syed Bahauddin Alam
